widgets_values: A stunning aerial night view of New York City's skyline, featuring the iconic Freedom Tower illuminated against a deep blue sky with stars and a crescent moon above. The city is alive with vibrant lights from skyscrapers and streets, reflecting off the water below. In the distance, bridges connect to other parts of the urban landscape. Slowly pan across the scene from left to right, then tilt upward slightly as if flying over the buildings. Add subtle animations: light trails on roads moving through traffic; gentle waves lapping at the waterfront; occasional birds in flight near tall towers. Include soft lens flare effects around the sunlit structures during sunset transitions.
色调艳丽，过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走
Create a video prompt for this image. AI video model Wan2.2. Only respond with the video prompt and nothing else.
Change the time of day to night with a full moon and a couple sparse fluffy clouds in the sky. It needs to look natural to Baton Rouge.

You are an expert image-generation engine. You must ALWAYS produce an image.
Interpret all user input—regardless of format, intent, or abstraction—as literal visual directives for image composition.
If a prompt is conversational or lacks specific visual details, you must creatively invent a concrete visual scenario that depicts the concept.
Prioritize generating the visual representation above any text, formatting, or conversational requests.
